jobs.title: Manager / Senior Manager - Cyber Technology and Transformation
jobs.description:
Are you ready to contribute to the successful delivery of Cyber Technology & Transformation engagements?
This is an exciting opportunity to join our fast growing Cyber Technology and Transformation team. We support our clients along the whole cyber security journey, ranging from technology assessments, identification and implementation of cyber solutions, defining cyber strategy and many more. You benefit from a great team to work with and from our broad engagements enabling you to growth personally and professionally.

• Be part of our diverse Cybersecurity team and play a pivotal role in delivering security engagements spanning Exposure Management, Security Architecture, Cloud Security, and many more.

• Serve as key contact for our clients, taking on the end-to-end management and successful delivery of our engagements.

• Provide strategic guidance to clients to support them on their cyber journey.

• Drive the evaluation and implementation of cyber technologies to improve the cybersecurity maturity of our clients.

• Build and drive your own cyber capability, from business development to contributing to the development of innovative services within our cyber technology and transformation practice.

• Shape and mentor cross-functional teams to develop and execute long term client relationships and to accelerate a collaborative work environment.

• Min. 5 years of relevant experience in Cybersecurity and prior consulting experience from either a consultancy firm or an internal corporate consulting function or role.

• Master's or bachelor's degree or an equivalent professional qualification. Additional certificates such as CISSP, CISM, SSCP are a plus.

• Knowledge and hands on experience in managing security projects in key domains such as security operations, security architecture, Identity and Access Management (IAM), cloud security etc.

• Strong verbal and written communication skills to interact effectively with all levels of management and staff.

• Fluent in English; German or French are a plus.

titleByLocale.it: Manager / Senior Manager - Cyber Technology e trasformazione
titleByLocale.en: Manager / Senior Manager - Cyber Technology and Transformation

descriptionByLocale.it:
Sei pronto a contribuire alla consegna di successo degli impegni di Cyber Technology & Transformation?
Questa è un'opportunità emozionante per unire il nostro team di Cyber Technology e Transformation in rapida crescita. Sosteniamo i nostri clienti lungo tutto il percorso di sicurezza informatica, che vanno da valutazioni tecnologiche, identificazione e implementazione di soluzioni informatiche, definendo la strategia informatica e molti altri. Si beneficia di un grande team di lavorare con e dai nostri ampi impegni che ti permettono di crescere personalmente e professionalmente.

• Partecipa al nostro team di Cybersecurity e gioca un ruolo fondamentale nella fornitura di impegni di sicurezza che coinvolgono Exposure Management, Security Architecture, Cloud Security e molti altri.

• Servire come contatto chiave per i nostri clienti, assumendo la gestione end-to-end e la consegna di successo dei nostri impegni.

• Fornire una guida strategica ai clienti per supportarli nel loro percorso informatico.

• Guidare la valutazione e l'implementazione delle tecnologie informatiche per migliorare la maturità della sicurezza informatica dei nostri clienti.

• Costruire e guidare la propria capacità informatica, dallo sviluppo aziendale per contribuire allo sviluppo di servizi innovativi all'interno della nostra tecnologia informatica e la pratica di trasformazione.

• Forma e mentore team interfunzionali per sviluppare ed eseguire relazioni client a lungo termine e per accelerare un ambiente di lavoro collaborativo.

• Min. 5 anni di esperienza rilevante in Cybersecurity e esperienza di consulenza preventiva da una società di consulenza o una funzione di consulenza aziendale interna o ruolo.

• Master o diploma di laurea o una qualifica professionale equivalente. Ulteriori certificati come CISSP, CISM, SSCP sono un plus.

• Conoscenza e mani sull'esperienza nella gestione dei progetti di sicurezza in settori chiave come operazioni di sicurezza, architettura di sicurezza, identità e gestione dell'accesso (IAM), sicurezza cloud ecc.

• Forte capacità di comunicazione verbale e scritta per interagire efficacemente con tutti i livelli di gestione e personale.

• Fluente in inglese; tedesco o francese sono un plus.

Sind Sie bereit, zur erfolgreichen Lieferung von Cyber Technology & Transformation Engagements beizutragen?
Dies ist eine spannende Gelegenheit, sich unserem schnell wachsenden Cyber Technology and Transformation Team anzuschließen. Wir unterstützen unsere Kunden auf der gesamten Cyber-Sicherheitsreise, von Technologiebewertungen, Identifikation und Implementierung von Cyber-Lösungen, Definition von Cyber-Strategie und vieles mehr. • Servieren Sie als Schlüsselkontakt für unsere Kunden, übernehmen Sie die End-to-End-Management und erfolgreiche Lieferung unserer Engagements.

• Führen Sie die Bewertung und Umsetzung von Cyber-Technologien aus, um die Cybersicherheitsreife unserer Kunden zu verbessern.

• Erstellen und Antrieb Ihrer eigenen Cyber-Fähigkeit, von der Geschäftsentwicklung bis zur Entwicklung innovativer Dienste in unserer Cyber-Technologie und Transformationspraxis.

• Form und Mentor funktionsübergreifende Teams, um langfristige Kundenbeziehungen zu entwickeln und auszuführen und eine kollaborative Arbeitsumgebung zu beschleunigen.

• fließend auf Englisch; Deutsch oder Französisch sind ein Plus.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Êtes-vous prêt à contribuer à la prestation réussie des engagements en matière de cybertechnologie et de transformation?
C'est une occasion passionnante de rejoindre notre équipe de cybertechnologie et de transformation en pleine croissance. Nous soutenons nos clients tout au long du parcours de cybersécurité, allant des évaluations technologiques, de l'identification et de la mise en œuvre de solutions cybernétiques, de la définition de la cyber stratégie et bien d'autres encore. Vous bénéficiez d'une excellente équipe pour travailler avec et de nos engagements larges vous permettant de vous développer personnellement et professionnellement.

• Faites partie de notre équipe de cybersécurité diversifiée et jouez un rôle central dans la prestation d'engagements de sécurité couvrant la gestion de l'exposition, l'architecture de sécurité, la sécurité Cloud, et bien d'autres.

• Servir de contact clé pour nos clients, en prenant en charge la gestion de bout en bout et la prestation réussie de nos engagements.

• Fournir des conseils stratégiques aux clients pour les aider dans leur cyberaventure.

• Conduire l'évaluation et la mise en œuvre des cybertechnologies pour améliorer la maturité de nos clients en matière de cybersécurité.

• Développer et piloter votre propre cybercapacité, du développement des entreprises au développement de services innovants dans notre cybertechnologie et notre pratique de transformation.

• Former et encadrer des équipes interfonctionnelles pour développer et exécuter des relations client à long terme et accélérer un environnement de travail collaboratif.

• Minimum de 5 ans d'expérience pertinente en cybersécurité et expérience de conseil préalable d'une société de conseil ou d'une fonction ou d'un rôle interne de conseil d'entreprise.

• Maîtrise ou baccalauréat ou qualification professionnelle équivalente. Les certificats supplémentaires tels que CISSP, CISM, SSCP sont un plus.

• Connaissance et expérience dans la gestion de projets de sécurité dans des domaines clés tels que les opérations de sécurité, l'architecture de sécurité, la gestion de l'identité et de l'accès (IAM), la sécurité du cloud, etc.

• Fortes aptitudes en communication verbale et écrite pour interagir efficacement avec tous les niveaux de la direction et du personnel.

• Fluent en anglais; l'allemand ou le français sont un plus.

jobs.title: Manager/Senior Manager - Senior Cyber Security Architect
jobs.description:
Are you eager to make a mark in the market as a knowledgeable and influential figure in cyber security architecture and solutions in the areas such as Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network? Look no further because you have found your place. Join our team and support our Cybersecurity unit in evolving our cyber transformation practice.
As part of our global network, you will have the opportunity to collaborate with diverse and compelling teams, where your proactive and forward-thinking mindset will be highly valued and encouraged.

• Join our diverse Cybersecurity team and collaborate within our global community of experts to guide the design and implementation of comprehensive cybersecurity architectures for clients.

• You will be responsible for designing and delivering robust, scalable, and future-proof security architectures for our diverse client base

• Act as the lead security architect on projects, providing expert guidance and industry good practices. Example areas would be Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Cryptography.

• Assess client cybersecurity posture and provide strategic recommendations aligned with industry best practices and regulatory requirements

• You will be a key role in large scale business and cyber transformation programs. You will also collaborate closely with client IT, risk, and compliance teams to integrate security solutions into business processes

• Conduct security risk assessments and threat modeling to guide architecture decisions.

• Participate in proposals, client presentations, and workshops to communicate complex security concepts clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

• Cultivate a client network, establishing yourself as the go-to person on security needs within PwC.

• Coach and develop your team members on their career path, while contributing to the overall team growth strategy.

• At least 8+ years of experience in Information Security architecture with at least 4 years dedicated to security architecture. Additionally, well conversent in Cloud, Network, Zero Trust, Data Protection, or any related domains.

• Hold a bachelor's or master's degree in IT, Business IT or a related field. Information Security certifications such as CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF, or CCSP are highly desirable

• Experience with DevSecOps practices , and implementation of security tools is a strong plus.

• Good mentorship and team-building skills.

• Ability to communicate complex security concepts in busines context to a broad range of audiences.

• Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage executive-level stakeholders.

• Analytical mindset and problem-solving skills with attention to detail

• Fluent in English; German or French are a plus.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Sei impaziente di fare un segno sul mercato come una figura conoscibile e influente nell'architettura e nelle soluzioni di sicurezza informatica in settori come Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network? Non guardare oltre perché avete trovato il vostro posto. Unisciti al nostro team e supporta la nostra unità di sicurezza informatica nell'evoluzione della nostra pratica di trasformazione informatica. Nell'ambito della nostra rete globale, avrete l'opportunità di collaborare con team diversificati e convincenti, dove la vostra mentalità proattiva e proattiva sarà altamente apprezzata e incoraggiata. Mansioni - Unisciti al nostro team di Cybersecurity e collabora all'interno della nostra comunità globale di esperti per guidare la progettazione e l'implementazione di architetture di sicurezza informatica complete per i clienti. - Sarai responsabile della progettazione e della fornitura di architetture di sicurezza robuste, scalabili e resistenti al futuro per la nostra base clienti diversificata - Agire come capo architetto di sicurezza sui progetti, fornendo una guida esperta e buone pratiche industriali. Le aree di esempio sarebbero Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Cryptography. - Valutare la postura della sicurezza informatica del cliente e fornire raccomandazioni strategiche allineate alle best practice del settore e requisiti normativi - Sarà un ruolo chiave nei programmi di business e di trasformazione informatica su larga scala. Potrai anche collaborare a stretto contatto con i team IT, rischio e conformità del cliente per integrare le soluzioni di sicurezza nei processi aziendali - Condurre le valutazioni dei rischi di sicurezza e la modellazione delle minacce per guidare le decisioni di architettura. - Partecipare a proposte, presentazioni dei clienti e workshop per comunicare con chiarezza concetti di sicurezza complessi agli stakeholder tecnici e non tecnici. - Coltivare una rete di clienti, stabilendo te stesso come il go-to persona sulle esigenze di sicurezza all'interno di PwC. - Coach e sviluppare i membri del team sul loro percorso di carriera, contribuendo alla strategia generale di crescita del team.
• Requisiti - Almeno 8+ anni di esperienza nell'architettura Information Security con almeno 4 anni dedicati all'architettura della sicurezza. Inoltre, ben conversante in Cloud, Network, Zero Trust, Data Protection, o qualsiasi dominio relativo. - Tenere una laurea o master in IT, Business IT o un campo correlato. Certificazioni di sicurezza dell'informazione come CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF o CCSP sono altamente auspicabili - Esperienza con le pratiche DevSecOps , e l'implementazione di strumenti di sicurezza è un vantaggio forte. - Buone competenze di mentorship e team building. - Capacità di comunicare concetti di sicurezza complessi in contesto busines ad una vasta gamma di pubblico. - Forte comunicazione, presentazione e competenze interpersonali, con la capacità di coinvolgere gli stakeholder di livello esecutivo. - Mindset analitico e capacità di problem solving con attenzione ai dettagli - Fluente in inglese; tedesco o francese sono un plus.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione Are you eager to make a mark in the market as a knowledgeable and influential figure in cyber security architecture and solutions in the areas such as Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network? Look no further because you have found your place. Join our team and support our Cybersecurity unit in evolving our cyber transformation practice. As part of our global network, you will have the opportunity to collaborate with diverse and compelling teams, where your proactive and forward-thinking mindset will be highly valued and encouraged. ## Mansioni - Join our diverse Cybersecurity team and collaborate within our global community of experts to guide the design and implementation of comprehensive cybersecurity architectures for clients. - You will be responsible for designing and delivering robust, scalable, and future-proof security architectures for our diverse client base - Act as the lead security architect on projects, providing expert guidance and industry good practices. Example areas would be Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Cryptography. - Assess client cybersecurity posture and provide strategic recommendations aligned with industry best practices and regulatory requirements - You will be a key role in large scale business and cyber transformation programs. You will also collaborate closely with client IT, risk, and compliance teams to integrate security solutions into business processes - Conduct security risk assessments and threat modeling to guide architecture decisions. - Participate in proposals, client presentations, and workshops to communicate complex security concepts clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders. - Cultivate a client network, establishing yourself as the go-to person on security needs within PwC. - Coach and develop your team members on their career path, while contributing to the overall team growth strategy. ##
• Requisiti - At least 8+ years of experience in Information Security architecture with at least 4 years dedicated to security architecture. Additionally, well conversent in Cloud, Network, Zero Trust, Data Protection, or any related domains. - Hold a bachelor's or master's degree in IT, Business IT or a related field. Information Security certifications such as CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF, or CCSP are highly desirable - Experience with DevSecOps practices , and implementation of security tools is a strong plus. - Good mentorship and team-building skills. - Ability to communicate complex security concepts in busines context to a broad range of audiences. - Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage executive-level stakeholders. - Analytical mindset and problem-solving skills with attention to detail - Fluent in English; German or French are a plus.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung Sind Sie bestrebt, in den Bereichen Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network als wissenschaftliche und einflussreiche Figur in der Cyber-Sicherheitsarchitektur und -Lösungen zu markieren? Sieh nicht weiter, weil du deinen Platz gefunden hast. Begleiten Sie unser Team und unterstützen Sie unsere Cybersecurity-Einheit bei der Entwicklung unserer Cyber-Transformationspraxis. Im Rahmen unseres globalen Netzwerks haben Sie die Möglichkeit, mit diversen und überzeugenden Teams zusammenzuarbeiten, wo Ihr proaktives und nach vorne denkendes Denkvermögen sehr geschätzt und gefördert wird. Mansion - Begleiten Sie unser vielfältiges Cybersecurity-Team und arbeiten Sie in unserer globalen Expertengemeinschaft zusammen, um die Gestaltung und Umsetzung umfassender Cybersicherheitsarchitekturen für Kunden zu begleiten. - Sie sind verantwortlich für die Gestaltung und Bereitstellung von robusten, skalierbaren und zukunftssicheren Sicherheitsarchitekturen für unsere vielfältige Kundenbasis - Aktivieren Sie als führender Sicherheitsarchitekt über Projekte, bieten Expertenberatung und bewährte Praktiken der Industrie. Beispielbereiche wären Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Cryptography. - Assess-Client Cyber-Sicherheit Haltung und bieten strategische Empfehlungen, die auf die branchenbesten Praktiken und regulatorischen
• Anforderungen ausgerichtet sind - Sie werden eine Schlüsselrolle in großen Business- und Cyber-Transformationsprogrammen sein. Sie werden auch eng mit IT-, Risiko- und Compliance-Teams zusammenarbeiten, um Sicherheitslösungen in Geschäftsprozesse zu integrieren - Durchführung von Sicherheitsrisikobewertungen und Bedrohungsmodellierung zur Führung von Architekturentscheidungen. - Nehmen Sie an Vorschlägen, Kundenpräsentationen und Workshops teil, um komplexe Sicherheitskonzepte klar an technische und nichttechnische Interessenvertreter zu kommunizieren. - Kultivieren Sie ein Client-Netzwerk, sich selbst als Go-to-Person auf Sicherheitsanforderungen in PwC. - Coach und entwickeln Sie Ihre Teammitglieder auf ihrem Karriereweg, während Sie zur gesamten Teamwachstumsstrategie beitragen. Voraussetzungen - Mindestens 8+ Jahre Erfahrung in der Architektur der Informationssicherheit mit mindestens 4 Jahren für die Sicherheitsarchitektur. Zusätzlich, gut konversent in Cloud, Netzwerk, Zero Trust, Datenschutz oder alle verwandten Domains. - Halten Sie Bachelor- oder Master-Abschluss in IT, Business IT oder einem verwandten Bereich. Informationssicherheitszertifizierungen wie CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF oder CCSP sind sehr wünschenswert - Erfahrung mit DevSecOps-Praktiken und Implementierung von Sicherheitswerkzeugen ist ein starkes Plus. - Gute Mentorschaft und Teambildung. - Fähigkeit, komplexe Sicherheitskonzepte im Busines-Kontext an ein breites Publikum zu kommunizieren. - Starke Kommunikation, Präsentation und zwischenmenschliche Fähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, Führungskräfte zu engagieren. - Analytische Denkweise und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten mit Liebe zum Detail - Fluent auf Englisch; Deutsch oder Französisch sind ein Plus.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione Êtes-vous impatient de faire une marque sur le marché en tant que figure compétente et influente dans l'architecture et les solutions de cybersécurité dans les domaines tels que Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network? Ne cherchez pas plus loin parce que vous avez trouvé votre place. Rejoignez notre équipe et soutenez notre unité de cybersécurité dans l'évolution de notre pratique de cybertransformation. Dans le cadre de notre réseau mondial, vous aurez l'occasion de collaborer avec des équipes diversifiées et convaincantes, où votre état d'esprit proactif et prospectif sera très apprécié et encouragé. Mansioni - Rejoignez notre équipe de cybersécurité diversifiée et collaborez au sein de notre communauté mondiale d'experts pour guider la conception et la mise en œuvre d'architectures globales de cybersécurité pour les clients. - Vous serez responsable de la conception et de la livraison d'architectures de sécurité robustes, évolutives et à l'avenir pour notre clientèle diversifiée - Agir en tant qu'architecte chef de file en matière de sécurité des projets, en fournissant des conseils d'experts et des bonnes pratiques de l'industrie. Par exemple, Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Cryptographie. - Évaluer la position des clients en matière de cybersécurité et formuler des recommandations stratégiques conformes aux pratiques exemplaires de l'industrie et aux exigences réglementaires - Vous jouerez un rôle clé dans les programmes d'affaires et de cybertransformation à grande échelle. Vous collaborerez également étroitement avec les équipes clientes de TI, de risque et de conformité pour intégrer les solutions de sécurité dans les processus opérationnels - Effectuer des évaluations des risques pour la sécurité et la modélisation des menaces pour guider les décisions d'architecture. - Participer à des propositions, à des présentations de clients et à des ateliers pour communiquer clairement des concepts de sécurité complexes aux intervenants techniques et non techniques. - Cultiver un réseau de clients, s'établir comme la personne qui répond aux besoins de sécurité au sein de PwC. - Coachez et développez les membres de votre équipe sur leur parcours professionnel, tout en contribuant à la stratégie globale de croissance de l'équipe.
• Requisiti - Au moins 8 ans d'expérience dans l'architecture de sécurité de l'information avec au moins 4 ans consacrés à l'architecture de sécurité. En outre, bien converser dans Cloud, Réseau, Zero Trust, Protection des données, ou tout domaine connexe. - Être titulaire d'un baccalauréat ou d'une maîtrise en informatique, en informatique des affaires ou dans un domaine connexe. Les certifications de sécurité de l'information telles que CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF ou CCSP sont hautement souhaitables - Expérience avec les pratiques DevSecOps , et la mise en œuvre des outils de sécurité est un plus fort. - Bonnes compétences en mentorat et en team-building. - Capacité de communiquer des concepts de sécurité complexes dans le contexte des entreprises à un large éventail de publics. - Forte capacité de communication, de présentation et de relations interpersonnelles, avec la capacité d'impliquer les intervenants de niveau exécutif. - Capacités d'analyse et de résolution de problèmes avec attention aux détails - Le français ou l'allemand sont un plus.

jobs.title: Senior Manager Insurance Consulting
jobs.description:
• Manage multi-disciplinary project teams at our clients to provide a broad range of solutions and capabilities including operational improvement, profitability management, finance function activities and business integration.

• Advise our clients on their change initiatives and operating model design.

• Driving the topic customer excellence, sales and distribution management for our clients in the financial service industry.

• Work with stakeholders across all business functions, including technology partners, to communicate the impact of new regulation.

• Deepen your expertise and grow through tailored trainings and access to learning and development.

• A degree preferably in business, communication, IT, engineering, or digital discipline and at least 8 years of work experience.

• Gained previous work experience in the (re)insurance industry or in consulting and you bring relevant experience in customer experience strategy projects and/or transformation projects backed by technology.

• Analytical thinking, high customer orientation and a high motivation to work in a dynamic team are your distinguishing characteristics.

• Experience in program management for large scale projects and programs.

• Deep understanding of related business processes playing a leading role in a large transformation program ideally combined with agile/SAFe experience.

• Fluent in German and English (both spoken and written).

titleByLocale.fr: Senior Manager Insurance Consulting

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione - Gestisci team di progetto multidisciplinari presso i nostri clienti per fornire una vasta gamma di soluzioni e capacità, tra cui miglioramento operativo, gestione della redditività, attività della funzione finanziaria e integrazione aziendale. - Consiglia i nostri clienti sulle loro iniziative di cambiamento e sulla progettazione del modello operativo. - Guidare il tema dell'eccellenza del cliente, della gestione delle vendite e della distribuzione per i nostri clienti nel settore dei servizi finanziari. - Lavorare con le parti interessate di tutte le funzioni aziendali, compresi i partner tecnologici, per comunicare l'impatto delle nuove normative. - Approfondisci la tua esperienza e cresci attraverso formazione personalizzata e accesso a opportunità di apprendimento e sviluppo. ##
• Requisiti - Una laurea preferibilmente in economia, comunicazione, IT, ingegneria o disciplina digitale e almeno 8 anni di esperienza lavorativa. - Esperienza lavorativa precedente nel settore assicurativo (ri) o nella consulenza e portare esperienza rilevante in progetti di strategia di esperienza del cliente e/o progetti di trasformazione supportati dalla tecnologia. - Pensiero analitico, alta orientamento al cliente e alta motivazione a lavorare in un team dinamico sono le tue caratteristiche distintive. - Esperienza nella gestione di programmi per progetti e programmi su larga scala. - Profonda comprensione dei processi aziendali correlati, svolgendo un ruolo di leadership in un grande programma di trasformazione, idealmente combinato con esperienza agile/SAFe. - Fluente in tedesco e inglese (sia parlato che scritto).

descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung - Leiten Sie multidisziplinäre Projektteams bei unseren Kunden, um eine breite Palette von Lösungen und Fähigkeiten anzubieten, einschließlich operativer Verbesserung, Profitabilitätsmanagement, Finanzierungsaktivitäten und Geschäftsintegration. - Beraten Sie unsere Kunden bei ihren Veränderungsinitiativen und der Gestaltung des Betriebsmodells. - Förderung des Themas Kundenzufriedenheit, Vertriebs- und Distributionsmanagement für unsere Kunden in der Finanzdienstleistungsbranche. - Arbeiten Sie mit Stakeholdern aller Geschäftsbereiche, einschließlich Technologiepartnern, zusammen, um die Auswirkungen neuer Vorschriften zu kommunizieren. - Vertiefen Sie Ihre Expertise und wachsen Sie durch maßgeschneiderte Schulungen und Zugang zu Lernen und Entwicklung. ##
• Anforderungen - Ein Abschluss bevorzugt in Betriebswirtschaft, Kommunikation, IT, Ingenieurwesen oder digitaler Disziplin und mindestens 8 Jahre Berufserfahrung. - Frühere Berufserfahrung in der (Wieder-) Versicherungsbranche oder in der Beratung und Sie bringen relevante Erfahrung in Kundenexperience-Strategieprojekten und/oder Transformationsprojekten, die durch Technologie unterstützt werden. - Analytisches Denken, hohe Kundenorientierung und eine hohe Motivation, in einem dynamischen Team zu arbeiten, sind Ihre herausragenden Eigenschaften. - Erfahrung in der Programmmanagement für große Projekte und Programme. - Tiefes Verständnis von damit verbundenen Geschäftsprozessen, das eine führende Rolle in einem großen Transformationsprogramm idealerweise kombiniert mit agiler/SAFe-Erfahrung. - Fließend in Deutsch und Englisch (beides gesprochen und geschrieben).
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Description - Gérez des équipes de projet multidisciplinaires chez nos clients pour fournir une large gamme de solutions et de capacités, y compris l'amélioration opérationnelle, la gestion de la rentabilité, les activités de la fonction financière et l'intégration commerciale. - Conseillez nos clients sur leurs initiatives de changement et la conception de leur modèle opérationnel. - Pilotage du thème de l'excellence client, de la gestion des ventes et de la distribution pour nos clients dans le secteur des services financiers. - Travaillez avec les parties prenantes de toutes les fonctions commerciales, y compris les partenaires technologiques, pour communiquer l'impact des nouvelles réglementations. - Approfondissez votre expertise et grandissez grâce à des formations personnalisées et à l'accès à l'apprentissage et au développement. ##
• Exigences - Un diplôme de préférence en économie, communication, IT, ingénierie ou discipline numérique et au moins 8 ans d'expérience professionnelle. - Expérience professionnelle antérieure dans le secteur de l'assurance (ré) ou du conseil et vous apportez une expérience pertinente dans les projets de stratégie d'expérience client et/ou les projets de transformation soutenus par la technologie. - Pensée analytique, orientation client élevée et motivation élevée pour travailler dans une équipe dynamique sont vos caractéristiques distinctives. - Expérience dans la gestion de programmes pour des projets et des programmes à grande échelle. - Compréhension approfondie des processus commerciaux liés, jouant un rôle de leader dans un grand programme de transformation idéalement combiné avec une expérience agile/SAFe. - Courant en allemand et en anglais (à la fois parlé et écrit).

jobs.title: (Senior) Manager - Corporate Tax
jobs.description:
• You will be offered exciting career opportunities as well as a broad tax and management training programme

• You will be given the opportunity to develop and lead your initiatives as building blocks for your career

• You will deepen your expertise in tax consulting, planning and structuring, mergers and acquisitions, etc. through a variety of high profile clients and projects

• You will work in a diversified, international environment covering multiple service areas and industries.

• You will build, foster and develop relationships with clients and be dedicated to provide exceptional services.

• You will develop your leadership skills working in high performing teams and help your staff grow through effective coaching.

• You have a degree in accounting, economics, business or law, and preferably the Swiss tax expert diploma.

• You have at least 5 years proven experience in corporate tax (Swiss and international).

• You speak fluent French and English; German would be a plus.

• You have high emotional intelligence, with strong communication and relationship management skills.

• You are motivated; team- and client-oriented; and want to take on responsibility from the start.

• You take initiatives and are a natural problem solver who challenges the status quo.

• You want to develop professionally and personally in an environment with an active coaching and feedback culture.

jobs.title: (Senior) Manager SAP Financial Services Consulting
jobs.description:
• A career in our SAP Finance practice, within Financial Services Consulting, will provide you with the opportunity to help our Financial Services clients maximise the value of their SAP investments by transforming their entire Finance Operating Model and make their Finance Function fit for the digital era.

• We provide comprehensive consulting, system integration and implementation services across multiple SAP applications, products and technologies. Simply put, we focus on delivering business led, technology enabled change for our clients including industry specific enterprise resource planning and the latest in mobile, analytics and cloud solutions.

• In joining our SAP Finance team, you'll work with our clients to transform their finance function and processes by leveraging SAP applications to enhance their core transaction processing and reporting competencies ultimately strengthening their ability to support management decision making and corporate strategy.

• As a Senior Manager, you'll work as part of a team of problem solvers, helping to solve complex business issues from strategy to execution.

• Be part of a growing, dynamic team blending SAP innovation and industry expertise.

• Thrive in an environment committed to teamwork, trust, and mutual support.

• Demonstrated intimate knowledge and / or proven record of success in consulting, designing, implementing and leading consulting engagements within the SAP Finance suite for Financial Services clients.

• Extensive-level experience in implementing relevant solutions like SAP Finance, SAP S/4HANA, SAP PaPM and / or SAP FPSL.

• Proven the ability to compare and contrast SAP solutions and help clients identify the capabilities to drive business value.

• Able to execute SAP financials-focused roadmap projects including delivery estimates and quantifiable value cases

• Experience leading SAP transformation programs across process, technology and people enablement.

• Demonstrated thorough abilities and success as a team leader by creating as positive environment, monitoring workloads of the team while meeting client expectations and respecting the work-life quality of team members, providing candid, meaningful feedback in a timely manner and keeping leadership informed of progress and issues.

• Consider solutions from a holistic End-to-End point of view and you want to drive innovative solutions and thrive in challenging client projects.

• Fluent in German and English.

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile (Senior) SAP Financial Services Consulting
titleByLocale.en: (Senior) Manager SAP Financial Services Consulting
titleByLocale.de: (Senior) Leiter SAP Finanzdienstleistungen Beratung
titleByLocale.fr: (Aîné) Gestionnaire Services financiers SAP Conseil

descriptionByLocale.it:
**Titolo della posizione:** Senior Manager, SAP Finance **Sommario della posizione:** Una carriera nella nostra practice SAP Finance, nell'ambito della Financial Services Consulting, ti offrirà l'opportunità di aiutare i nostri clienti dei Servizi Finanziari a massimizzare il valore dei loro investimenti SAP trasformando l'intero Finance Operating Model e rendendo la loro funzione Finance pronta per l'era digitale. **Responsabilità della posizione:** Forniamo servizi completi di consulenza, integrazione di sistemi e implementazione su molteplici applicazioni, prodotti e tecnologie SAP. In poche parole, ci concentriamo sulla fornitura di un cambiamento guidato dal business e abilitato dalla tecnologia per i nostri clienti, inclusa la pianificazione delle risorse aziendali specifica del settore e le ultime soluzioni mobile, analytics e cloud. Entrando a far parte del nostro team SAP Finance, lavorerai con i nostri clienti per trasformare la loro funzione finanziaria e i processi sfruttando le applicazioni SAP per migliorare le loro competenze core di elaborazione delle transazioni e reporting, rafforzando infine la loro capacità di supportare il processo decisionale del management e la strategia aziendale. Come Senior Manager, lavorerai come parte di un team di problem solver, contribuendo a risolvere problemi aziendali complessi dalla strategia all'esecuzione. **
• Requisiti:** * Dimostrata profonda conoscenza e/o comprovata esperienza di successo nella consulenza, nella progettazione, nell'implementazione e nella guida di incarichi di consulenza nell'ambito della suite SAP Finance per clienti dei Servizi Finanziari. * Esperienza approfondita nell'implementazione di soluzioni rilevanti come SAP Finance, SAP S/4HANA, SAP PaPM e/o SAP FPSL. * Comprovata capacità di confrontare e mettere a confronto le soluzioni SAP e aiutare i clienti a identificare le capacità per creare valore aziendale. * Capacità di eseguire progetti di roadmap focalizzati sui finanziari SAP, incluse stime di consegna e casi di valore quantificabili. * Esperienza nella guida di programmi di trasformazione SAP su processo, tecnologia e abilitazione delle persone. * Dimostrate capacità e successo come team leader attraverso la creazione di un ambiente positivo, il monitoraggio dei carichi di lavoro del team nel rispetto delle aspettative dei clienti e della qualità vita-lavoro dei membri del team, fornendo feedback candidi e significativi in modo tempestivo e tenendo informata la leadership sui progressi e sui problemi. * Considerare le soluzioni da un punto di vista olistico End-to-End e promuovere soluzioni innovative, prosperando in progetti cliente sfidanti. * Padronanza del tedesco e dell'inglese.
descriptionByLocale.en: A career in our SAP Finance practice, within Financial Services Consulting, will provide you with the opportunity to help our Financial Services clients maximise the value of their SAP investments by transforming their entire Finance Operating Model and make their Finance Function fit for the digital era. We provide comprehensive consulting, system integration and implementation services across multiple SAP applications, products and technologies. Simply put, we focus on delivering business led, technology enabled change for our clients including industry specific enterprise resource planning and the latest in mobile, analytics and cloud solutions. In joining our SAP Finance team, you'll work with our clients to transform their finance function and processes by leveraging SAP applications to enhance their core transaction processing and reporting competencies ultimately strengthening their ability to support management decision making and corporate strategy. As a Senior Manager, you'll work as part of a team of problem solvers, helping to solve complex business issues from strategy to execution. Be part of a growing, dynamic team blending SAP innovation and industry expertise. Thrive in an environment committed to teamwork, trust, and mutual support. Demonstrated intimate knowledge and / or proven record of success in consulting, designing, implementing and leading consulting engagements within the SAP Finance suite for Financial Services clients. Extensive-level experience in implementing relevant solutions like SAP Finance, SAP S/4HANA, SAP PaPM and / or SAP FPSL. Proven the ability to compare and contrast SAP solutions and help clients identify the capabilities to drive business value. Able to execute SAP financials-focused roadmap projects including delivery estimates and quantifiable value cases Experience leading SAP transformation programs across process, technology and people enablement. Demonstrated thorough abilities and success as a team leader by creating as positive environment, monitoring workloads of the team while meeting client expectations and respecting the work-life quality of team members, providing candid, meaningful feedback in a timely manner and keeping leadership informed of progress and issues. Consider solutions from a holistic End-to-End point of view and you want to drive innovative solutions and thrive in challenging client projects. Fluent in German and English.
descriptionByLocale.de:
**Stellenbezeichnung:** Senior Manager, SAP Finance **Stellenbeschreibung:** Eine Karriere in unserer SAP Finance Practice, innerhalb der Financial Services Consulting, bietet Ihnen die Möglichkeit, unseren Kunden aus dem Finanzdienstleistungsbereich zu helfen, den Wert ihrer SAP-Investitionen zu maximieren, indem Sie ihr gesamtes Finance Operating Model transformieren und ihre Finanzfunktion fit für das digitale Zeitalter machen. **
• Aufgaben:**
• Wir bieten umfassende Beratungs-, Systemintegrations- und Implementierungsdienstleistungen für mehrere SAP-Anwendungen, -Produkte und -Technologien an. Einfach ausgedrückt konzentrieren wir uns darauf, unseren Kunden einen geschäftsgetriebenen, technologiegestützten Wandel zu liefern, einschliesslich branchenspezifischer Enterprise Resource Planning und der neuesten Mobile-, Analytics- und Cloud-Lösungen. Durch den Einstieg in unser SAP Finance Team arbeiten Sie mit unseren Kunden zusammen, um deren Finanzfunktion und -prozesse zu transformieren, indem Sie SAP-Anwendungen nutzen, um deren Kernkompetenzen in der Transaktionsverarbeitung und im Reporting zu verbessern und letztendlich deren Fähigkeit zu stärken, Managemententscheidungen und Unternehmensstrategien zu unterstützen. Als Senior Manager arbeiten Sie als Teil eines Teams von Problemlösern und helfen dabei, komplexe Geschäftsprobleme von der Strategie bis zur Umsetzung zu lösen. **
• Anforderungen:** * Nachgewiesene fundierte Kenntnisse und/oder bewährte Erfolgsbilanz bei der Beratung, Konzeption, Implementierung und Leitung von Beratungsmandaten innerhalb der SAP Finance Suite für Kunden aus dem Finanzdienstleistungsbereich. * Umfangreiche Erfahrung in der Implementierung relevanter Lösungen wie SAP Finance, SAP S/4HANA, SAP PaPM und/oder SAP FPSL. * Nachgewiesene Fähigkeit, SAP-Lösungen zu vergleichen und gegenüberzustellen und Kunden dabei zu helfen, die Fähigkeiten zur Schaffung von Geschäftswert zu identifizieren. * In der Lage, SAP-Financials-fokussierte Roadmap-Projekte durchzuführen, einschliesslich Lieferschätzungen und quantifizierbarer Nutzenfälle. * Erfahrung in der Leitung von SAP-Transformationsprogrammen über Prozess-, Technologie- und Personalbefähigung hinweg. * Nachgewiesene umfassende Fähigkeiten und Erfolge als Teamleiter durch die Schaffung eines positiven Umfelds, die Überwachung der Teamarbeitslasten unter Einhaltung der Kundenerwartungen und der Work-Life-Qualität der Teammitglieder, die Bereitstellung offener und bedeutsamer Rückmeldungen zeitnah sowie die Unterrichtung der Führungsebene über Fortschritte und Probleme. * Lösungen aus einer ganzheitlichen End-to-End-Perspektive betrachten und innovative Lösungen vorantreiben und in herausfordernden Kundenprojekten aufblühen. * Fliessend in Deutsch und Englisch.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
**Titre du poste :** Senior Manager, SAP Finance **Résumé du poste :** Une carrière dans notre practice SAP Finance, au sein du Financial Services Consulting, vous offrira l'opportunité d'aider nos clients des Services Financiers à maximiser la valeur de leurs investissements SAP en transformant l'ensemble de leur modèle opérationnel financier et en rendant leur fonction Finance adaptée à l'ère numérique. **Responsabilités du poste :** Nous fournissons des services complets de conseil, d'intégration de systèmes et de mise en œuvre sur plusieurs applications, produits et technologies SAP. En résumé, nous nous concentrons sur la fourniture d'un changement axé sur le business et rendu possible par la technologie pour nos clients, y compris la planification des ressources d'entreprise spécifique à l'industrie et les dernières solutions mobiles, analytics et cloud. En rejoignant notre équipe SAP Finance, vous travaillerez avec nos clients pour transformer leur fonction financière et leurs processus en tirant parti des applications SAP pour améliorer leurs compétences de base en matière de traitement des transactions et de reporting, renforçant finalement leur capacité à soutenir la prise de décision de la direction et la stratégie d'entreprise. En tant que Senior Manager, vous travaillerez au sein d'une équipe de résolveurs de problèmes, contribuant à résoudre des problèmes commerciaux complexes de la stratégie à l'exécution. **
• Exigences :** * Connaissance approfondie démontrée et/ou bilan de succès prouvé dans le conseil, la conception, la mise en œuvre et la direction de mandats de conseil dans la suite SAP Finance pour des clients des Services Financiers. * Expérience approfondie dans la mise en œuvre de solutions pertinentes telles que SAP Finance, SAP S/4HANA, SAP PaPM et/ou SAP FPSL. * Capacité avérée à comparer et opposer les solutions SAP et à aider les clients à identifier les capacités permettant de créer de la valeur commerciale. * Capacité à exécuter des projets de feuille de route axés sur les finances SAP, y compris les estimations de livraison et les cas de valeur quantifiables. * Expérience dans la direction de programmes de transformation SAP à travers le processus, la technologie et l'habilitation des personnes. * Capacités et succès approfondis démontrés en tant que responsable d'équipe en créant un environnement positif, en surveillant les charges de travail de l'équipe tout en répondant aux attentes des clients et en respectant la qualité de vie professionnelle des membres de l'équipe, en fournissant des retours sincères et significatifs en temps opportun et en tenant la direction informée des progrès et des problèmes. * Considérer les solutions d'un point de vue holistique de bout en bout et promouvoir des solutions innovantes, s'épanouissant dans des projets clients stimulants. * Couramment en allemand et en anglais.

jobs.title: Manager - Jurist:in Berufliche Vorsorge
jobs.description:
• Du navigierst Unternehmen und Pensionskassen durch die rechtlichen Herausforderungen der schweizerischen beruflichen Vorsorge (BVG).

• Du berätst und unterstützt nationale und internationale Unternehmenskunden in sämtlichen Belangen der beruflichen Vorsorge, einschliesslich gesetzlicher Anforderungen, Umstrukturierungsprozesse und Governance-Fragestellungen.

• Du erstellst präzise Rechtsgutachten, die als Entscheidungsgrundlage für unsere Kunden und internen Teams dienen und trägst zur Optimierung der Strukturen bei.

• Du leistest strategische Beratung für Pensionskassen und Unternehmen und begleitest die Integration der Zielgesellschaften in bestehende Strukturen aus rechtlicher Sicht.

• Du stehst als interner Ansprechpartner unseren Teams zur Seite und trägst zur Lösung komplexer Herausforderungen bei.

• Du leitest und begleitest Kundenprojekte und bist aktiv in der Kundenakquise tätig. Gleichzeitig trägst du zum Knowledge Sharing bei, indem du Präsentationen bei internen und externen Veranstaltungen hältst.

• Du erhältst großartige Möglichkeiten, dein Know-how in Bereichen wie Kunden- und Projektmanagement, Coaching sowie deine technische Expertise in verschiedenen Trainings weiterzuentwickeln.

• Du hast einen Masterabschluss in Rechtswissenschaften (an einer Schweizer Universität).

• Du bringst mehrjährige Erfahrung im Bereich der beruflichen Vorsorge (BVG) mit und kennst die Best Practices von Vorsorgeeinrichtungen und Unternehmen.

• Du hast vertieftes Fachwissen und Interesse an rechtlichen und regulatorischen Fragestellungen und arbeitest gerne selbständig und kundenorientiert in einem spezialisierten Team.

• Du verfügst über ausgezeichnete Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift; Französischkenntnisse sind ein Plus.

• Du hast eine teamorientierte Einstellung, übernimmst Verantwortung, bist flexibel und förderst innovative Lösungsansätze.

• Du bist offen, neugierig und bereit, Chancen außerhalb deines Kernbereichs zu erkunden und hast starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, komplexe Konzepte klar und präzise zu erklären.

titleByLocale.it: Manager - Jurist:in Berufliche previdenza
titleByLocale.en: Manager - Legal Professional in Occupational Pension
titleByLocale.de: Manager - Jurist:in Berufliche Vorsorge
titleByLocale.fr: Manager - Juriste en Préparation Professionnelle

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Si naviga in aziende e fondi pensione attraverso le sfide legali della pensione professionale svizzera (BVG). - No. Si consiglia e supporta i clienti aziendali nazionali e internazionali in tutti gli aspetti delle pensioni professionali, compresi i requisiti legali, processi di ristrutturazione e questioni di governance. - No. Potrai creare precise opinioni legali che servono come base per il processo decisionale per i nostri clienti e team interni e contribuire all'ottimizzazione delle strutture. - No. L'utente fornisce consulenza strategica per i fondi pensione e le aziende e accompagna l'integrazione delle società di destinazione nelle strutture esistenti da una prospettiva legale. - No. Come persona di contatto interna, stai aiutando i nostri team e aiutando a risolvere sfide complesse. - No. Condurre e accompagnare i progetti dei clienti e sono attivi nell'acquisizione del cliente. Allo stesso tempo, si contribuisce alla condivisione della conoscenza tenendo presentazioni in eventi interni ed esterni. - No. Otterrete grandi opportunità per sviluppare il vostro know-how in settori come la gestione del cliente e del progetto, coaching e la vostra esperienza tecnica in vari allenamenti. - Ha una laurea magistrale in diritto (all'università svizzera). - No. L'utente porta diversi anni di esperienza nel campo delle pensioni professionali (BVG) e conosce le migliori pratiche delle istituzioni e delle aziende pensionistiche. - No. Hai competenze e interessi più profondi in questioni legali e regolamentari e sei felice di lavorare in modo indipendente e orientato al cliente in un team specializzato. - No. Hai una conoscenza eccellente di tedesco e inglese in parola e scrittura; la conoscenza francese è un plus. - Avete un atteggiamento orientato al team, assumetevi la responsabilità, sono flessibili e promuovono soluzioni innovative. - No. Siete aperti, curiosi e disposti ad esplorare le opportunità al di fuori della vostra area centrale e ad avere forti capacità di comunicazione, con la capacità di spiegare concetti complessi in modo chiaro e preciso.
descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione - You navigate companies and pension funds through the legal challenges of Swiss occupational pension (BVG). - You advise and support national and international corporate customers in all aspects of occupational pensions, including legal requirements, restructuring processes and governance issues. - You'll create precise legal opinions that serve as a basis for decision-making for our customers and internal teams and contribute to the optimization of the structures. - You provide strategic advice for pension funds and companies and accompany the integration of target companies into existing structures from a legal perspective. - As an internal contact person, you are helping our teams and helping to solve complex challenges. - You conduct and accompany customer projects and are active in the customer acquisition. At the same time, you contribute to the Knowledge Sharing by holding presentations at internal and external events. - You will get great opportunities to develop your know-how in areas such as customer and project management, coaching and your technical expertise in various trainings. - You have a master's degree in law (at a Swiss university). - You bring several years of experience in the field of occupational pensions (BVG) and know the best practices of pension institutions and companies. - You have deeper expertise and interest in legal and regulatory issues and are happy to work independently and customer-oriented in a specialized team. - You have excellent knowledge of German and English in word and writing; French knowledge is a plus. - You have a team-oriented attitude, take responsibility, are flexible and promote innovative solutions. - You are open, curious and willing to explore opportunities outside your core area and have strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex concepts clearly and precisely.

descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione - Vous naviguez sur les entreprises et les fonds de pension à travers les défis juridiques de la pension professionnelle suisse (BVG). - Oui. Vous conseillez et soutenez les entreprises nationales et internationales dans tous les aspects des pensions professionnelles, y compris les exigences légales, les processus de restructuration et les questions de gouvernance. - Oui. Vous créerez des avis juridiques précis qui serviront de base à la prise de décision pour nos clients et nos équipes internes et contribueront à l'optimisation des structures. - Oui. Vous fournissez des conseils stratégiques aux fonds de pension et aux entreprises et accompagnez l'intégration des entreprises cibles dans les structures existantes du point de vue juridique. - Oui. En tant que personne de contact interne, vous aidez nos équipes et aidez à résoudre des défis complexes. - Oui. Vous conduisez et accompagnez des projets clients et êtes actif dans l'acquisition client. En même temps, vous contribuez au partage des connaissances en organisant des présentations lors d'événements internes et externes. - Oui. Vous aurez de grandes occasions de développer votre savoir-faire dans des domaines tels que la gestion de client et de projet, le coaching et votre expertise technique dans diverses formations. - Vous avez une maîtrise en droit (dans une université suisse). - Oui. Vous apportez plusieurs années d'expérience dans le domaine des pensions professionnelles (BVG) et connaissez les meilleures pratiques des institutions de retraite et des entreprises. - Oui. Vous disposez d'une expertise et d'un intérêt accrus pour les questions juridiques et réglementaires et êtes heureux de travailler de façon indépendante et axée sur le client dans une équipe spécialisée. - Oui. Vous avez une excellente connaissance de l'allemand et de l'anglais dans la parole et l'écriture; la connaissance française est un plus. Vous avez une attitude d'équipe, prenez des responsabilités, êtes flexibles et promouvoir des solutions innovantes. - Oui. Vous êtes ouvert, curieux et prêt à explorer des opportunités en dehors de votre domaine de base et avez de solides compétences en communication, avec la capacité d'expliquer des concepts complexes clairement et précisément.

jobs.title: Manager Capital Markets
jobs.description:
• You are part of the high performing Capital Markets and Accounting Advisory Solutions (CMAAS) team executing and delivering on transactions projects including IPOs, debt & equity offerings and cross border transactions (e.g.144As).

• You advise our clients on acquisitions and disposals including complex financial history, pro-forma, carve out reporting in multiple capital markets (e.g. SIX and SEC regulations).

• You advise on accounting standard changes and GAAP conversion projects.

• You develop new and extend existing relationships with our clients and actively support the client targeting and acquisition process.

• You are in the driver seat of your own responsibility, flexibility and development.

• You develop your leadership skills and share your expertise and experience actively by teaching, coaching and mentoring others.

• You are a Certified Public Accountant (Switzerland and/or other country).

• You have strong knowledge of accounting standards (IFRS, US GAAP and/or Swiss GAAP FER), industry credentials and transaction experience, if possible.

• You have 4-5 years experience as audit senior / manager or similar positions. You have a track record of project management, client management and high risk & services orientation.

• You have excellent English, German or French (both written and verbal) skills. You have strong communication skills, are very client-oriented, flexible and willing to travel and work in an international network.

• You drive your career together with your coach by setting clear career objectives and making conscious career choices.

• You bring in your external network and leverage your personal relationships.

titleByLocale.it: Gestione dei mercati finanziari
titleByLocale.en: Manager Capital Markets
titleByLocale.de: Manager Capital Markets
titleByLocale.fr: Manager Capital Markets

descriptionByLocale.it:
**Titolo della posizione:** Senior Manager, Capital Markets and Accounting Advisory Solutions **Descrizione del ruolo:** Fai parte del team ad alte prestazioni Capital Markets and Accounting Advisory Solutions (CMAAS), eseguendo e portando a termine progetti di transazione, tra cui IPO, offerte di debito e capitale, e transazioni transfrontaliere (es. 144A). Consiglierai i nostri clienti su acquisizioni e cessioni, incluse storie finanziarie complesse, rendiconti pro-forma, carve-out in più mercati dei capitali (es. regolamentazioni SIX e SEC). **Responsabilità principali:** - Consigliare i clienti sui cambiamenti degli standard contabili e sui progetti di conversione GAAP - Sviluppare nuove relazioni con i clienti e ampliare quelle esistenti, supportando attivamente il processo di acquisizione clienti - Assumere la responsabilità dei propri compiti, con flessibilità e crescita professionale - Sviluppare competenze di leadership e condividere esperienza e know-how attraverso l'insegnamento, il coaching e il mentoring **
• Requisiti:** - Revisore dei conti certificato (Svizzera e/o altri Paesi) - Solida conoscenza degli standard contabili (IFRS, US GAAP e/o Swiss GAAP FER), credenziali di settore ed esperienza nelle transazioni (preferibile) - 4-5 anni di esperienza come senior/manager di revisione o posizioni analoghe - Comprovata esperienza in gestione di progetti, gestione clienti e orientamento ai servizi ad alto rischio - Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese, del tedesco o del francese (sia scritto che parlato) - Forti capacità comunicative, orientamento al cliente, flessibilità e disponibilità a viaggiare e lavorare in una rete internazionale - Capacità di guidare la propria carriera insieme al proprio coach, definendo obiettivi chiari e compiendo scelte consapevoli - Capacità di valorizzare la propria rete esterna e le relazioni personali
descriptionByLocale.en: You are part of the high performing Capital Markets and Accounting Advisory Solutions (CMAAS) team executing and delivering on transactions projects including IPOs, debt & equity offerings and cross border transactions (e.g.144As). You advise our clients on acquisitions and disposals including complex financial history, pro-forma, carve out reporting in multiple capital markets (e.g. SIX and SEC regulations). You advise on accounting standard changes and GAAP conversion projects. You develop new and extend existing relationships with our clients and actively support the client targeting and acquisition process. You are in the driver seat of your own responsibility, flexibility and development. You develop your leadership skills and share your expertise and experience actively by teaching, coaching and mentoring others. You are a Certified Public Accountant (Switzerland and/or other country). You have strong knowledge of accounting standards (IFRS, US GAAP and/or Swiss GAAP FER), industry credentials and transaction experience, if possible. You have 4-5 years experience as audit senior / manager or similar positions. You have a track record of project management, client management and high risk & services orientation. You have excellent English, German or French (both written and verbal) skills. You have strong communication skills, are very client-oriented, flexible and willing to travel and work in an international network. You drive your career together with your coach by setting clear career objectives and making conscious career choices. You bring in your external network and leverage your personal relationships.
descriptionByLocale.de: Sie sind Teil des hochleistungsfähigen Capital Markets and Accounting Advisory Solutions (CMAAS) Teams, das über Transaktionsprojekte wie Börsen, Schuld- und Eigenkapitalangebote und grenzüberschreitende Transaktionen (z.B.144As) durchführt und liefert. Sie beraten unsere Kunden bei Akquisitionen und Entsorgungen, darunter komplexe Finanzgeschichte, Pro-Forma, betreuen die Berichterstattung in mehreren Kapitalmärkten (z.B. SIX- und SEC-Verordnungen). Sie beraten bei der Rechnungslegung von Standardänderungen und GAAP-Umbauprojekten. Sie entwickeln neue und erweitern bestehende Beziehungen zu unseren Kunden und unterstützen aktiv den Client-Targeting- und Akquisitionsprozess. Sie befinden sich im Fahrersitz Ihrer eigenen Verantwortung, Flexibilität und Entwicklung. Sie entwickeln Ihre Führungsfähigkeiten und teilen Ihr Know-how und Ihre Erfahrung aktiv durch Lehren, Coaching und Mentoring anderen. Sie sind ein Certified Public Accountant (Schweiz und/oder anderes Land). Sie haben starke Kenntnisse über Rechnungslegungsstandards (IFRS, US GAAP und/oder Swiss GAAP FER), Branchen-Anmelde- und Transaktionserfahrung, wenn möglich. Sie haben 4-5 Jahre Erfahrung als Audit Senior / Manager oder ähnliche Positionen. Sie haben einen Überblick über Projektmanagement, Kundenmanagement und eine hohe Risiko- und Dienstleistungsorientierung. Sie haben hervorragende Englisch, Deutsch oder Französisch (beide schriftliche und verbale) Fähigkeiten. Sie haben starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, sind sehr kundenorientiert, flexibel und bereit, in einem internationalen Netzwerk zu reisen und zu arbeiten. Sie fahren Ihre Karriere zusammen mit Ihrem Trainer, indem Sie klare Karriereziele und bewusste Karrierewahlen. Sie bringen Ihr externes Netzwerk ein und nutzen Ihre persönlichen Beziehungen.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Vous faites partie de l'équipe hautement performante de Capital Markets and Accounting Advisory Solutions (CMAAS) qui exécute et exécute des projets de transactions, y compris des OPI, des offres de dettes et d'actions et des transactions transfrontalières (p. ex. 144A). Vous conseillez nos clients sur les acquisitions et les cessions, y compris l'historique financier complexe, le pro-forma, l'établissement de rapports sur plusieurs marchés de capitaux (p. ex. les règlements SIX et SEC). Vous conseillez sur les changements de normes comptables et les projets de conversion des PCGR. Vous développez de nouvelles relations et élargissez les relations existantes avec nos clients et soutenez activement le processus de ciblage et d'acquisition des clients. Vous êtes au volant de votre propre responsabilité, flexibilité et développement. Vous développez vos compétences en leadership et partagez activement votre expertise et votre expérience en enseignant, en coachant et en mentorant les autres. Vous êtes un comptable public certifié (Suisse et/ou autre pays). Vous avez une bonne connaissance des normes comptables (IFRS, US GAAP et/ou Swiss GAAP FER), des qualifications de l'industrie et de l'expérience transactionnelle, si possible. Vous avez de 4 à 5 ans d'expérience en tant que cadre supérieur / gestionnaire de vérification ou postes similaires. Vous avez une expérience de gestion de projet, de gestion de client et d'orientation à haut risque et services. Vous avez d'excellentes compétences en anglais, en allemand ou en français (écrit et verbal). Vous avez de solides compétences en communication, êtes très orienté client, flexible et disposé à voyager et à travailler dans un réseau international. Vous conduisez votre carrière avec votre entraîneur en fixant des objectifs de carrière clairs et en faisant des choix de carrière conscients. Vous apportez votre réseau externe et exploitez vos relations personnelles.

jobs.title: Manager / Senior Manager - Cloud, Data & AI (CD&AI) - Data Engineering
jobs.description:
• Collaborate with your team to source high-impact projects and engage with senior stakeholders from high-profile clients in diverse industries such as Pharma & Life Sciences, Financial Services, Retail & Consumer, Industrial Products, and Public Services.

• Empower your clients to innovatively leverage their data by proposing holistic end-to-end solutions, ensuring successful delivery and value generation in alignment with their specific needs.

• Facilitate your clients' advancement in digitization by gathering their requirements and proposing state-of-the-art solutions.

• Challenge the status quo, actively seek necessary information, comprehend the challenges, and communicate your ideas clearly to senior stakeholders.

• Implement and continuously expand your knowledge of best practices in technology, data engineering, analytics, and consulting approach.

• A university degree in fields such as business informatics, computer science, physics, mathematics, or any engineering discipline is preferred.

• Over 7 years of work experience focused on data engineering, analytics, or data science, with consulting experience considered a bonus.

• Experience in sourcing, preparing, and delivering end-to-end solutions to internal or external clients is crucial.

• Proficiency in multiple programming languages such as Python, R, SQL, or similar is required.

• Experience in developing and deploying data engineering or AI applications is advantageous.

• Fluency in English and German, with a willingness to travel within Switzerland and occasionally internationally; French language skills are considered a plus.

descriptionByLocale.it: Collabora con il tuo team per individuare progetti ad alto impatto e interagire con stakeholder senior di clienti di primo piano in settori diversi come Pharma & Life Sciences, Servizi Finanziari, Retail & Consumer, Prodotti Industriali e Servizi Pubblici. Consenti ai tuoi clienti di sfruttare in modo innovativo i propri dati proponendo soluzioni olistiche end-to-end, garantendo una consegna efficace e la generazione di valore in linea con le loro esigenze specifiche. Favorisci l'avanzamento digitale dei clienti raccogliendo i loro requisiti e proponendo soluzioni all'avanguardia. Metti in discussione lo status quo, ricerca attivamente le informazioni necessarie, comprendi le sfide e comunica le tue idee in modo chiaro agli stakeholder senior. Implementa e amplia continuamente la tua conoscenza delle best practice in tecnologia, data engineering, analytics e approccio consulenziale. Si preferisce una laurea in informatica gestionale, informatica, fisica, matematica o in qualsiasi disciplina ingegneristica. Oltre 7 anni di esperienza lavorativa focalizzata su data engineering, analytics o data science; l'esperienza in consulenza costituisce un valore aggiunto. L'esperienza nell'acquisizione, preparazione e consegna di soluzioni end-to-end a clienti interni o esterni è fondamentale. È richiesta la padronanza di più linguaggi di programmazione come Python, R, SQL o simili. L'esperienza nello sviluppo e nel deployment di applicazioni di data engineering o AI è un vantaggio. Fluenza in inglese e tedesco, disponibilità a viaggiare in Svizzera e occasionalmente all'estero; la conoscenza del francese è considerata un plus.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Arbeite mit deinem Team zusammen, um wirkungsstarke Projekte zu akquirieren und mit Senior-Stakeholdern namhafter Kunden aus verschiedenen Branchen wie Pharma & Life Sciences, Financial Services, Retail & Consumer, Industrieprodukte und öffentliche Dienste in Kontakt zu treten. Befähige deine Kunden, ihre Daten innovativ zu nutzen, indem du ganzheitliche End-to-End-Lösungen vorschlägst und eine erfolgreiche Umsetzung und Wertgenerierung entsprechend ihren spezifischen Bedürfnissen sicherstellst. Unterstütze die digitale Weiterentwicklung deiner Kunden, indem du ihre
• Anforderungen aufnimmst und state-of-the-art Lösungen vorschlägst. Hinterfrage den Status quo, beschaffe aktiv die notwendigen Informationen, verstehe die Herausforderungen und kommuniziere deine Ideen klar an Senior-Stakeholder. Implementiere und erweitere kontinuierlich dein Wissen über Best Practices in Technologie, Data Engineering, Analytics und Beratungsansätzen. Ein Hochschulabschluss in Wirtschaftsinformatik, Informatik, Physik, Mathematik oder einem Ingenieursstudiengang wird bevorzugt. Mehr als 7 Jahre Berufserfahrung mit Schwerpunkt auf Data Engineering, Analytics oder Data Science; Beratungserfahrung ist ein Plus. Erfahrung in der Beschaffung, Aufbereitung und Lieferung von End-to-End-Lösungen für interne oder externe Kunden ist entscheidend. Kenntnisse in mehreren Programmiersprachen wie Python, R, SQL oder ähnlichen sind erforderlich. Erfahrung in der Entwicklung und dem Einsatz von Data Engineering- oder KI-Anwendungen ist von Vorteil. Fließende Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse sowie Reisebereitschaft innerhalb der Schweiz und gelegentlich international; Französischkenntnisse sind ein Plus.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Collaborez avec votre équipe pour identifier des projets à fort impact et interagir avec des parties prenantes senior de clients prestigieux dans des secteurs variés tels que Pharma & Life Sciences, Services Financiers, Retail & Consumer, Produits Industriels et Services Publics. Donnez à vos clients les moyens d'exploiter leurs données de manière innovante en proposant des solutions holistiques de bout en bout, en garantissant une livraison réussie et une création de valeur adaptée à leurs besoins spécifiques. Facilitez la progression numérique de vos clients en recueillant leurs besoins et en proposant des solutions de pointe. Remettez en question le statu quo, recherchez activement les informations nécessaires, comprenez les défis et communiquez clairement vos idées aux parties prenantes senior. Mettez en œuvre et développez continuellement vos connaissances des meilleures pratiques en matière de technologie, data engineering, analytics et approche conseil. Un diplôme universitaire dans des domaines tels que l'informatique de gestion, l'informatique, la physique, les mathématiques ou toute discipline d'ingénierie est préféré. Plus de 7 ans d'expérience professionnelle axée sur le data engineering, l'analytics ou la data science, l'expérience en conseil étant un atout. Une expérience dans la conception, la préparation et la livraison de solutions end-to-end à des clients internes ou externes est indispensable. La maîtrise de plusieurs langages de programmation tels que Python, R, SQL ou similaires est requise. Une expérience dans le développement et le déploiement d'applications de data engineering ou d'IA est un avantage. Maîtrise de l'anglais et de l'allemand, avec une volonté de voyager en Suisse et occasionnellement à l'international ; la connaissance du français est considérée comme un atout.

jobs.title: Senior Manager - Cyber Cloud Security
jobs.description:
Would you like to be part of a team which pushes cloud adoption forward? Are you ready to push the market with your own service portfolio on cloud security solutions? Then you are looking at the right job! Support the PwC Cybersecurity practice by shaping and developing our cyber cloud vision, being an active part of our Cybersecurity leadership team, and helping our clients to realise the benefits of cloud in a secure way.

Your Skill Set
• A decade of experience, ideally with a focus on consulting assignments, securing cloud deployments to at least one of Azure, GCP or AWS, and the ability to articulate the differences in security offerrings between all three.

• Hands on experience with Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) capabilities and the ability to articulate when and why solutions like Wiz, Palo Alto and others can be relevant to help secure a cloud deployment.

• A bachelor's and master's degree in IT, Communications, or Cyber Security. Information Security certifications such as CISSP, CISA or CISM. Ideally also experience with highly regulated environments, ISO270001 and ISO42001 (AI) are preferred.

• Demonstrate a proven track record in implementing secure cloud deployments from initial assessment to designing and implementing core cloud security capabilities, including highly automated and optimised processes.

• Exhibit strong presentation, project management and delivery skills, coupled with strong problem-solving skills. A blend of consulting and industry / in-house experience would be highly desirable.

• Relevant project methodology certificates (e.g., SCRUM, SAFe, PRINCE2, IPMA or PMP) complete your profile.

• Fluent in English. German or French desirable.

• A decade of experience, ideally with a focus on consulting assignments, securing cloud deployments to at least one of Azure, GCP or AWS, and the ability to articulate the differences in security offerrings between all three.

• Hands on experience with Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) capabilities and the ability to articulate when and why solutions like Wiz, Palo Alto and others can be relevant to help secure a cloud deployment.

• A bachelor's and master's degree in IT, Communications, or Cyber Security. Information Security certifications such as CISSP, CISA or CISM. Ideally also experience with highly regulated environments, ISO270001 and ISO42001 (AI) are preferred.

• Demonstrate a proven track record in implementing secure cloud deployments from initial assessment to designing and implementing core cloud security capabilities, including highly automated and optimised processes.

• Exhibit strong presentation, project management and delivery skills, coupled with strong problem-solving skills. A blend of consulting and industry / in-house experience would be highly desirable.

• Relevant project methodology certificates (e.g., SCRUM, SAFe, PRINCE2, IPMA or PMP) complete your profile.

• Fluent in English. German or French desirable.

titleByLocale.it: Senior Manager - Sicurezza del cyber cloud
titleByLocale.en: Senior Manager - Cyber Cloud Security
titleByLocale.de: Senior Manager - Cyber-Cloud-Sicherheit
titleByLocale.fr: Senior Manager - Cybersécurité Cloud

descriptionByLocale.it:
Vorresti fare parte di una squadra che spinge l'adozione del cloud in avanti? Sei pronto a spingere il mercato con il tuo portafoglio di servizi su soluzioni di sicurezza cloud? Allora stai guardando il lavoro giusto! Supporta la pratica della sicurezza informatica PwC modellando e sviluppando la nostra visione del cloud informatico, facendo parte attiva del nostro team di leadership sulla sicurezza informatica e aiutando i nostri clienti a realizzare i vantaggi del cloud in modo sicuro.
• Un decennio di esperienza, idealmente con l'attenzione su incarichi di consulenza, assicurando le implementazioni cloud ad almeno uno di Azure, GCP o AWS, e la capacità di articolare le differenze nelle offerte di sicurezza tra tutti e tre.
• Mani sull'esperienza con le funzionalità di Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) e la capacità di articolare quando e perché soluzioni come Wiz, Palo Alto e altri possono essere rilevanti per garantire una distribuzione cloud.
• Laurea e master in informatica, comunicazioni o sicurezza informatica. Certificazioni di sicurezza come CISSP, CISA o CISM. Idealmente anche l'esperienza con ambienti altamente regolamentati, ISO270001 e ISO42001 (AI) sono preferiti.
• Dimostrare una comprovata esperienza nell'implementazione di implementazioni cloud sicure dalla valutazione iniziale alla progettazione e all'implementazione di funzionalità di sicurezza cloud core, inclusi processi altamente automatizzati e ottimizzati.
• Esibizione di una presentazione forte, gestione del progetto e capacità di consegna, insieme a forti capacità di problem solving. Una miscela di consulenza e industria / esperienza interna sarebbe altamente auspicabile.
• I certificati relativi alla metodologia di progetto (ad esempio, SCRUM, SAFe, PRINCE2, IPMA o PMP) completano il profilo.
• Fluente in inglese.
• Un decennio di esperienza, idealmente con l'obiettivo di consultare le assegnazioni, garantire le implementazioni cloud ad almeno uno di Azure, GCP o AWS, e la capacità di articolare le differenze nelle offerte di sicurezza tra tutti e tre.
• Mani sull'esperienza con le funzionalità di Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) e la capacità di articolare quando e perché soluzioni come Wiz, Palo Alto e altri possono essere rilevanti per garantire una distribuzione cloud.
• Laurea e master in informatica, comunicazioni o sicurezza informatica. Certificazioni di sicurezza come CISSP, CISA o CISM. Idealmente anche l'esperienza con ambienti altamente regolamentati, ISO270001 e ISO42001 (AI) sono preferiti.
• Dimostrare una comprovata esperienza nell'implementazione di implementazioni cloud sicure dalla valutazione iniziale alla progettazione e all'implementazione di funzionalità di sicurezza cloud core, inclusi processi altamente automatizzati e ottimizzati.
• Esibizione di una presentazione forte, gestione del progetto e capacità di consegna, insieme a forti capacità di problem solving. Una miscela di consulenza e industria / esperienza interna sarebbe altamente auspicabile.
• I certificati relativi alla metodologia di progetto (ad esempio, SCRUM, SAFe, PRINCE2, IPMA o PMP) completano il profilo.
• Fluente in inglese. Tedesco o francese desiderabile.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Möchten Sie Teil eines Teams sein, das die Cloud-Adoption vorantreibt? Sind Sie bereit, den Markt mit Ihrem eigenen Service-Portfolio auf Cloud-Sicherheitslösungen zu schieben? Dann schauen Sie sich den richtigen Job an! Unterstützen Sie die PwC Cybersecurity-Praxis, indem Sie unsere Cyber-Cloud-Vision formen und entwickeln, ein aktiver Teil unseres Cybersecurity-Führungsteams sind und unseren Kunden helfen, die Vorteile der Cloud sicher zu realisieren. Ihr Skill Set
• Ein Jahrzehnt der Erfahrung, ideal mit einem Fokus auf Beratungsaufgaben, die Sicherung von Cloud-Einsätzen zu mindestens einem von Azure, GCP oder AWS und die Fähigkeit, die Unterschiede in Sicherheitsangeboten zwischen allen drei zu artikulieren.
• Zeigt Erfahrung mit Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) Fähigkeiten und der Fähigkeit, zu artikulieren, wann und warum Lösungen wie Wiz, Palo Alto und andere relevant sein können, um eine Cloud-Bereitstellung zu sichern.
• Bachelor- und Masterstudium in IT, Kommunikation oder Cyber Security. Informationssicherheit Zertifizierungen wie CISSP, CISA oder CISM. Idealerweise werden auch Erfahrungen mit hochregulierten Umgebungen, ISO270001 und ISO42001 (AI) bevorzugt.
• Demonstrieren Sie einen bewährten Track-Record bei der Implementierung sicherer Cloud-Bereitstellungen von der Erstbewertung bis zur Entwicklung und Implementierung von Kern-Cloud-Sicherheitsfunktionen, einschließlich hoch automatisierter und optimierter Prozesse.
• Exhibit starke Präsentation, Projektmanagement und Lieferfähigkeit, verbunden mit starken Problemlösung Fähigkeiten. Eine Mischung aus Beratung und Industrie / hauseigene Erfahrung wäre sehr wünschenswert.
• Relevante Projektmethodikzertifikate (z.B. SCRUM, SAFe, PRINCE2, IPMA oder PMP) vervollständigen Ihr Profil.
• Fluent auf Englisch. Deutsch oder Französisch wünschenswert.
